description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and build. The lint job should run in a matrix of linters (checkdoc, pylava, mypy) on an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the code and running tox with the selected linter. The build job should run in a matrix of Python versions (py36 to py310 with and without uvloop) on an ubuntu-latest environment with a RabbitMQ service, checking out the code and running tox with the selected Python version.
